Triggering the system-level engineering outsourcing network authenticity validation and the 'large screen project general contracting group' demotion probe. This enterprise, named 'Hengtuo Technology,' possesses a business license that is a dimension-crossing sci-fi drama: it opens with 'semiconductor equipment production,' the middle is a hypermarket for all categories of electronic equipment, and the ending suddenly swerves into 'steel structure engineering, landscape lighting engineering construction.' However, the forensic logic engine accurately locked onto its physical lifeline: the insured headcount is only 4 people! Although the paid-in capital is 3 million RMB, the spatial coordinate is located at 'Room 701, South D2, No. 32 Dazhou Road, Yuhuatai District.' This devastating 'Room 701' declares the bankruptcy of all heavy industry lies. In a 7th-floor office, can 4 people with 3 million RMB build a semiconductor equipment production line? Can they even erect steel structures and dig landscape lighting upstairs? The probe mercilessly deleted all false words like 'production, semiconductor,' and extracted businesses highly related to 'optoelectronics, display screens' from its lengthy engineering list: 'display equipment leasing, installation; intelligent engineering, landscape lighting engineering construction.' The truth is extremely clear: this is a 100% pure 4-Employee High-Rise LED Screen & Lighting Project Broker. These 4 people might all be project managers and business personnel; they go out to secure contracts for mall large screens, building lighting, or security surveillance. After receiving an order, they use the 3 million in funds to buy LED modules, surveillance cameras, and steel materials, and then outsource to street-side construction teams to go on-site to 'erect steel structures, hang screens, and connect wires.' The official 'major electronics factory' tag is a serious misjudgment of its true 'engineering general contractor' identity, and it has now been thoroughly demoted.
